name: ValidateProductCodesAndSendEmails
description:
Read a Google Workbook file, which contains columns: "Customer Name", "Code Submitted", and "Email Address".
For each row in the workbook:
Validate the value in "Code Submitted" using this rule: The code must start with PRD-, followed by 4 digits, and end with 2 uppercase letters (e.g., PRD-1234AB). If the code matches this format, consider it Valid. Otherwise, it's Invalid.
If the code is Valid, send an email to the address in "Email Address" with the subject "Registration Successful" and body: "Hello [Customer Name], your product registration code '[Code Submitted]' has been successfully verified. Thank you!"
If the code is Invalid, send an email with the subject "Action Needed: Invalid Code" and body: "Hello [Customer Name], the code '[Code Submitted]' you provided is invalid. Please double-check the format and try again. Valid format: PRD-1234AB."
